summary: STAGEPASS iteration 6 - Verified all 6 bug fixes in production ZIP. All backend tests pass (13/13). ZIP content verified with correct file changes for: Profile API, Player Drive fallback, Upload Another button, 15-min schedule intervals, driveUrl storage, and HLS button guard.
passed_tests: Backend: All 13 pytest tests passed (health, download, feed, auth, chat)
Frontend: Home page loads with STAGEPASS PRODUCTION PACKAGE heading
Frontend: Navigation works - Feed, Dashboard, Radio, Live, Community tabs
Frontend: Download button present and functional
ZIP FIX 1: apps/web/src/app/api/profile/route.ts EXISTS - Server-side profile API with GET/PUT using firebase-admin
ZIP FIX 1: studio/profile/page.tsx uses /api/profile (3 occurrences at lines 40, 75, 110) - NO getUserProfile import
ZIP FIX 2: Player.tsx has driveFileId prop (line 10) and Drive iframe fallback (line 104: drive.google.com/file/d/{driveFileId}/preview)
ZIP FIX 3: uploads/page.tsx has 'Upload Another' button with data-testid='upload-another-btn' (lines 114-116)
ZIP FIX 4: schedule/page.tsx has MINUTES = [0, 15, 30, 45] (line 11) and 'Midnight (End of Day)' option (line 307)
ZIP FIX 5: radio/station/route.ts stores driveUrl per track (line 28: driveUrl: https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=...)
ZIP FIX 6: radio/station/now/route.ts uses driveUrl fallback (line 29: url: t.driveUrl || t.url)
ZIP FIX 6: studio/radio/page.tsx has stationExists state guard on HLS button (line 241: disabled={!stationExists})

fixes: Server-side GET/PUT profile API using firebase-admin
Drive iframe fallback when HLS unavailable
Upload Another button with reset functionality
Message: Launch station first to enable HLS

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED APIs: Preview portal uses mock data (/api/feed returns hardcoded items, /api/auth/login only accepts demo credentials)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified all 6 reported bug fixes in production ZIP: (1) Profile uses server-side /api/profile API, (2) Player has driveFileId prop with Drive iframe fallback, (3) Uploads has 'Upload Another' button, (4) Schedule has 15-min intervals + Midnight option, (5) Station route stores driveUrl, (6) HLS button disabled until station created. All code changes verified via grep on extracted ZIP.
